title: taraxacum crocellum
intro: Taraxacum crocellum, also known as the lesser dandelion or small dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, Taraxacum. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum crocellum include reducing inflammation and relieving digestive issues, as well as supporting the kidneys and liver. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum crocellum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
